metadata.significance: References the trade journeys of Quraysh and calls them to worship Allah

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ

translations.en_sahih: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
translations.en_yusufali: For the covenants (of security and safeguard enjoyed) by the Quraish,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana kebiasaan aman tenteram kaum Quraisy (penduduk Makkah)

translations.en_sahih: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
translations.en_yusufali: Their covenants (covering) journeys by winter and summer,-
translations.ms_basmeih: (laitu) kebiasaan aman tenteram perjalanan mereka (menjalankan perniagaan) pada musim sejuk (ke negeri Yaman), dan pada musim panas (ke negeri Syam),

translations.en_sahih: Let them worship the Lord of this House,
translations.en_yusufali: Let them adore the Lord of this House,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka hendaklah mereka menyembah Tuhan yang menguasai rumah (Kaabah) ini,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Allathee atAAamahum min jooAAin waamanahum min khawfin

translations.en_sahih: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
translations.en_yusufali: Who provides them with food against hunger, and with security against fear (of danger).
translations.ms_basmeih: Tuhan yang memberi mereka penghidupan: menyelamatkan mereka dari kelaparan, dan mengamankan mereka dari ketakutan.
